text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text:
It's yakisoba dog for lunch today! ♪ Woohoo,
today's a good day! ♪

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
At Gold Ship's invitation, I join her for lunch on
the roof of the academy.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Whoooosh...

text_block_list.name: Nakayama Festa
text_block_list.text: ...Well, aren't you chipper?

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text: N-Nakayama!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: A chill zips through the air like a sword!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Nakayama Festa's competitive aura staggers
Gold Ship!

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text:
(Her vibes are really up to eleven today... About
to pull something, is she?!)

text_block_list.name: Nakayama Festa
text_block_list.text:
Heh. When I see that fear in your eyes, it only
makes me wanna challenge you even more.

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text: Challenge me? To what?

text_block_list.name: Nakayama Festa
text_block_list.text:
There's just a little something I wanna try.
Sugoroku, that is.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Sugoroku, the traditional Japanese board game
where players use dice to race to the finish!

text_block_list.name: Nakayama Festa
text_block_list.text: How 'bout it? I bet you could put up a good fight.

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text:
A good fight, you say? I'm not one to pass up a
challenge...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Warning! With Gold Ship in the zone, it's highly
likely the match will last the entire lunch period.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Should I send her in?! Or should I stop her?!

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text:
...Sorry, Trainer. I've got to settle this. Go ahead
and eat lunch without me.
choice_data_list: Wait, I'll play on your behalf.
Wait, I'll play on your behalf.

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text:
...Sorry, Trainer. I've got to settle this. Go ahead
and eat lunch without me.
choice_data_list: Wait, I'll play on your behalf.
Wait, I'll play on your behalf.

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text: You'll what?

text_block_list.name: Nakayama Festa
text_block_list.text: Heh. Like a good challenge, do you? I'm in!

text_block_list.name: Nakayama Festa
text_block_list.text: Let's do this! You versus me!

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text: Oh, c'mon! Seriously? What am I, chopped liver?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
If it's a challenge she's after, I'm going to give
everything I've got! That was my intent at least,
but...

text_block_list.name: Nakayama Festa
text_block_list.text: ...Huh. Was that it?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Despite my most valiant efforts, I get my butt
handed to me on a silver platter.

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text: Ahhh, what a nice break. So how's the game go―

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text:
Oh, looks like you got owned. That's all right
though. I'm just happy I got to relax.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Victory is only for the determined and driven. My
match with Nakayama Festa is a painful reminder
of just how cutthroat the world of competition
can be.

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text: Oh yeah, I got this!

text_block_list.name: Nakayama Festa
text_block_list.text:
Heh. Then roll the dice. Whoever rolls higher can
decide who goes first.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Ding, ding, ding! And thus, their fierce battle begins!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Hours pass, and neither side relents! The final
stages of the game unfold, and it's a close race to
the finish!

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text:
Rgh... This is ridiculous! No matter how many
times I roll the dice, I can't land right on the
finishing square!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Every time it seems Gold Ship is about to seize
victory, she overshoots the goal and has to circle
back yet again.

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text: I need a four... Please! Gimme a four this time!

text_block_list.name: Nakayama Festa
text_block_list.text:
Come on, then. Let's see if Lady Luck's on your
side!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Gold Ship prays fervently, and we all watch with
bated breath to see what she rolls.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Clack...

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text: C-can it be?

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text:
AWW YEAH! FOUR! IT'S A FOOOUR! I'M
CLEEEAR!

text_block_list.name: Nakayama Festa
text_block_list.text:
Hmph, looks like Lady Luck cut you a break after
all.

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text: Ohhh yeah! How's that for lucky?!

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text:
I could take on the world right now! I could win
anything, be it a small-town squid catching
tournament or a huge Grand Prix race!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
It's by the skin of her teeth, but Gold Ship
snatches a win from the jaws of defeat!

text_block_list.name: Nakayama Festa
text_block_list.text:
Well, lookie there. A six! Hahaha! Back to the
start with ya!

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text: Nooo! The heck's wrong with me?!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
And with that, the mighty Gold Ship suffers
defeat...

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text: Sigh... I lost...

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text:
Ugh, what's the point of living anymore... Even
standing is such a pain...

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text: Hey, Trainer, carry me back to the dorm...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Burnt out, Gold Ship loses all the wind from her
sails...
